Ammar & Co (UK) Ltd acquires, progresses and sells residential property across the North West. The business is focused on new residential development, land-led opportunities and disciplined property acquisition with a clear commercial brief.

About the company

A focused residential property business with an interest in land, redevelopment and new schemes where careful acquisition and disciplined execution produce a strong end result.

Residential developerFocused on land, planning and residential value.
Our approach

A disciplined approach to acquisition, planning and delivery.

Ammar & Co (UK) Ltd focuses on residential development opportunities with clear planning potential, disciplined appraisal and strong end-market presentation. The business remains selective, commercially grounded and residential-led throughout.

Residential-led opportunities in established locations
Land and site potential assessed on planning scope and end value
Projects progressed with a disciplined and practical commercial brief
Direct approaches welcomed from landowners, agents and introducers
Why work with us

A clearer, more dependable development approach

Residential focus

The business is presented clearly around residential development, land acquisition and end-value creation.

Disciplined delivery

Schemes are assessed and progressed with attention to planning potential, viability, presentation and saleability.

Professional presentation

The website is structured to give landowners, agents, buyers and professional contacts a clearer and more confident first impression.

Core focus

The website remains tightly positioned around residential development, land acquisition and real-estate activity.

Residential Property Development

Schemes progressed from acquisition through planning, delivery and sale — residential-led, commercially viable and presented to a strong market standard on completion.

Land wanted

We are actively looking for residential development opportunities across Greater Manchester, Cheshire and the wider North West.

Land acquisition

Do you have a site, plot or property with development potential?

We consider residential-led opportunities including plots, redevelopment sites, infill land, underused property and houses with scope for replacement or redevelopment. Approaches are handled with discretion and a straightforward process.

Email land detailsGeneral enquiry
Acquisition criteria

What we are looking for

Residential plots

Small and medium sites suitable for residential-led schemes in good locations.

Existing houses

Properties with redevelopment, replacement or land-release potential.

Infill land

Gaps, side plots and underused parcels with planning potential.

Off-market

Direct approaches welcomed. Transactions handled with discretion throughout.

A focused residential development company in the North West.

Ammar & Co (UK) Ltd acquires, appraises and progresses residential development opportunities across Greater Manchester, Cheshire and the wider North West. The business remains selective, commercially grounded and focused on land, planning potential and residential value.
